title: malaxis roohutuensis
intro: Malaxis roohutuensis is a species of orchid native to India, commonly known as a terrestrial orchid. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Research suggests that Malaxis roohutuensis has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
